div.style: border:2px solid white; border-radius: 6px; background: white; margin-bottom: 15px;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;border:none; border: 2px solid white;

td.style: width: 50%; padding: 10px 20px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; border:none;padding-left:0px;

div.style: color: #8B1538; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase;

td.div: SAMEER SHARAF AL OTAIBI TRADING COMPANY

td.style: width: 50%; padding: 10px 20px; text-align: right; vertical-align: middle; border:none;padding-right:0px;

div.style: color: #8B1538; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 900; direction: rtl; font-family: 'Tajawal', sans-serif;

td.style: width: 33%; text-align: left; font-size: 16px; color: #333; vertical-align: top; border-top: 2px solid white;border-right: 0px solid white; border-bottom: 1px solid white;border-left: 1px solid white;padding-top:0px;padding-left:0px;
width: 34%; text-align: center; vertical-align: top; padding: 5px 10px; border-top: 2px solid white;border-right: 0px solid white; border-bottom: 1px solid white;border-left: 1px solid white;

img.style: max-height: 140px; max-width: 100%; object-fit: contain; display: block; margin: -23px auto;padding-top:8px;padding-top:5px;

td.style: width: 33%; text-align: right; font-size: 15px; color: #333; vertical-align: top; direction: rtl; padding: 0px 10px 6px 10px; border-top: 1px solid white;border-right: 0px solid white; border-bottom: 1px solid white; border-left: 1px solid white;

div.style: line-height: 1.3; font-family: 'Tajawal', sans-serif; font-weight:900; padding-right:0px; margin-top:0px; text-align: right; direction: rtl;

td.style: width:33%; padding:4px;border-right: 1px solid black;

tr.td:
Jeddah Al Fayha Branch: 7655 Al Fayha Al Fayha Dist., Jeddah 22244-3108, Saudi Arabia
Tel/Mobile: +966 571 313 243
Email: ssaoe.jeddah@gmail.com

td.style: width:33%; padding:4px;

tr.td:
Jeddah Baladiya Branch: Sookul Anwar, Al Baladeah, Aziziyah, Jeddah 31303, Saudi Arabia
Tel/Mobile: +966 536 122 833
Email:ssaoe.jeddah@gmail.com

td.style: width:33%; padding:4px;border-left: 1px solid black;

tr.td:
Dammam Branch: 8515 Qutaibah bin Muslim St., Al Souq, Dammam 4525-32242, Saudi Arabia
Tel/Mobile: +966 535 081 008
Email: ssaoe.jeddah@gmail.com

div.style: color:black; padding:8px; text-align:center; margin-bottom:10px; font-weight:bold; font-size:16px;

table.style: margin-top: 5px; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #000; font-size: 11px;

td.style: width: 50%; padding: 4px 8px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; height: 28px;
width: 50%; padding: 4px 8px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; height: 28px;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: top; height: 110px;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #000; vertical-align: top; height: 110px;

table.style: border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 11px; margin-top: 5px; border: 1px solid #000;

td.style: padding: 4px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; width: 20%;
padding: 4px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; width: 20%;
padding: 4px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; width: 20%;
padding: 4px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; width: 20%;
padding: 4px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; width: 20%;

table.style: border-collapse:collapse; margin-top:15px; font-size:14px; border:1px solid #000; table-layout:fixed;

th.style: text-align:center; padding:8px 4px; color:#080808; line-height:1.3; border:1px solid #000;
text-align:center; padding:8px 4px; color:#080808; line-height:1.3; border:1px solid #000;
text-align:center; padding:8px 4px; color:#080808; line-height:1.3; border:1px solid #000;
text-align:center; padding:8px 4px; color:#080808; line-height:1.3; border:1px solid #000;

td.style: text-align:center; padding:6px 4px; border:1px solid #000; overflow:hidden;
text-align:left; padding:6px 4px; border:1px solid #000; word-wrap:break-word;
text-align:center; padding:6px 4px; border:1px solid #000;
text-align:center; padding:6px 4px; border:1px solid #000;
padding-left:3px; border:1px solid #000;
padding-left:3px; border:1px solid #000;
border:1px solid #000; padding:6px;
padding-left:3px; border:1px solid #000;
padding-left:3px; border:1px solid #000;
padding-left:3px; border:1px solid #000;
padding-left:3px; border:1px solid #000;
